steps: Pick islets into 35mm non-tissue cultured coated (NTCC) dish and ‘wash’ islets with 2mL of appropriate low glucose (1mM or 2.8mM) KRBH.
Pick islets into new 35mm NTCC dish and pre-incubate in 2mL of appropriate low glucose (1mM or 2.8mM) KRBH at 37°C, 5% CO 2 for 1 hour. undetermined, low glucose KRBH Undetermined 01:00:00
Transfer islets into a new 35mm NTCC dish, add 2ml low glucose KRBH and pre-incubate for 1 hour at 37°C, 5% CO 2 . undetermined, low glucose KRBH Undetermined 01:00:00

Pick 15 islets/tube into labelled eppendorf tubes. Each treatment group should be done in triplicate. For the basline phenotyping of human islets in the ADI IsletCore, we use three groups with differing low glucose and high glucose values: 1) 1mM glucose to 10mM glucose 2) 1mM glucose to 16.7mM glucose 3) 2.8mM glucose to 16.7mM glucose
Add 500µL of low glucose KRBH, and incubate for 1 at 37°C, 5% CO 2 . Leave tube lids open. undetermined, low glucose KRBH Undetermined 01:00:00
Close lids, gently invert tubes, and spin at 1000 RPM in a benchtop centrifuge for 1 minute to pellet islets.
Collect 500µL of the supernatant, or as much as possible without disturbing the pellet. Store supernatant at -20°C until insulin assay. Undetermined
Resuspend islets in 500µL of high glucose KRBH, and incubate for 1 hour at 37°C, 5% CO 2 . Leave lids open. undetermined, high glucose KRBH Undetermined 01:00:00
Close lids, gently invert tubes, and spin at 1000 RPM for 1 minute to pellet islets.
Collect 500µL of the supernatant, or as much as possible without disturbing the pellet. Store supernatant at -20°C until insulin assay. Undetermined
Add 500µL of acid ethanol to the islets and vortex. Store tube at -20°C until insulin assay. undetermined, acid ethanol Undetermined

Prepare KRBH solution as follows: %s %s Warm KRBH solution to 37°C in incubator 37°C, 5% CO 2 (Appoximately 30 min). Once solution is warmed, pH KRBH solution to 7.4 with NaOH and bring to volume. KRBH Solution should be kept in incubator throughout the experiment. Add glucose and/or additional treatments as required. eg: %s %s Acid Ethanol - ensure acid ethanol is available %s %s
Pick human islets of similar size and shape into Human Islet Culture Media until as close as possible to 100% purity. Human Islet Culture Media %s %s
Culture islets overnight in incubator at 37°C, 5% CO 2 .

Samples are assayed using ALPCO Stellux Human Insulin ELISA kit (cat# 80-INSHU-CH10). Content samples are diluted with zero buffer 1:400. High glucose samples may need to be diluted with zero buffer 1:10.
creator: Aliya F Spigelman
